etymology_and_history.root_language: Language**: From "dis-" + "card" + "-ed" from Latin "discardare" (having been thrown away)
etymology_and_history.original_meaning: Meaning**: Having been thrown away; experiencing rejected abandoned and discarded rejection supported by value awareness

etymology_and_history.cultural_shifts: Shifts**: Having been thrown away → rejected/abandoned → discarded → understanding development
